violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Inspector provided some. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as various cooked items) in the 2 door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC moved eggs to bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Rice and ground turkey were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC dated items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Establishment serves 18 month and older scrambled eggs using non-pasteurized eggs. PIC informed to use pasteurized eggs. Non-pasteurized can only be used when baking. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Wood is used in the construction of platform under lowboy unit in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
Inspector observed outside trash can with hole in it. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
The coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair (missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

Wood is used in the construction of platform for lowboy in kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
Trash bins located outside(along side) observed with holes. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
The coving in the kitchen observed detaching from wall. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
